_comment: Vermilion Bird Country (朱雀国) — the ruling cultivation nation of Planet Suzaku. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L31): level-6 cultivation country (raised by Situ Nan). The Vermilion Bird Master / Vermilion Bird Child is a renewable office. Situ Nan was 2nd-Gen; Ye Wuyou was 1st; the 3rd betrayed Situ Nan; the 13th was Qian Pinghai; the 14th severed Situ Nan's arm; the 15th was Zhou Wutai; the 16th was Wang Lin. The Vermilion Bird Divine Sect headquarters is here (fire arts, Vermilion Bird bloodline, 'Vermilion Bird Nine Mysterious Transformations'). Highest-tier ecology on the planet. Derived fauna: Vermilion-Feather Hawk (Soul Transformation tier aerial predator). Derived flora: Vermilion-Blood Ginseng. World-law tier: medium (Soul Transformation ceiling). Prime Directive: the elevated Qi density is objective — it is the reason the country can sustain Soul Transformation cultivators and beasts, not the other way around.
